offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual generation of financial statements causes late client reports. We automate the generation and distribution of reports instead of manual spreadsheet preparation and email distribution.
problem: Manual generation of financial statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
